interventions.name: I3 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: people-and-system comparison tasks that identify who is helped or harmed in bounded cases

interventions.name: I3 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: data-choice and design-choice prompts tied to fairness outcomes

interventions.name: I3 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: tradeoff evaluation routines that require one benefit and one risk to be named

interventions.name: I3 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: human-centered design checks that ask who the user is and what conditions matter
